title: Addis Clip Tight Food Storage Containers 240 ml Rectangle Pack Of 3 Airtight Containers Bpa Free Easy Locking Lid Clips, Clear Transparent
features: Addis Clip Tight containers with four lockable lid clips for effective airtight long lasting freshness; Stackable, simple & easy to use - Wide range of sizes, styles and uses available - Perfect for all food & liquid, Craft & Hobbies, DIY & other home bits & bobs storage

Helping you save money and time, keeping raw ingredients and leftovers fresher for longer; Perfect reusable food storage solution; helping the planet with a sustainable, no need for single use tin foil or cling film; Just use, wash and use again and again

High quality silicone seal airtight lid; Leak-proof, stackable & airtight fridge, freezer, microwave (remove lid), dishwasher safe (top rack) containers; phthalate and BPA-Free; Clear plastic for excellent storage visibility; Designed to nest for easy storage when not in use
Pack of 3 airtight 240ml Rectangular size containers; Each unit dimensions w8.5 x d12.3 x h4.2cm (w3.25" x d5" x h2.75 inches)
Addis Since 1780 a Great British brand 'Made for Life' with Addis quality 5 year promise across the Clip Tight range
